{"name": "replace_function", "arguments": {"path": "llm/q1/core/handlers.py", "func_name": "parse_tool_calls", "content": "    def parse_tool_calls(self, text):
        calls = []
        block_pattern = re.compile(
            r'<tool_call\s+([^>]*)>\s*<content>\s*(?:<!\[CDATA\[)?(.*?)(?:\]\]>)?\s*</content>\s*</tool_call>',
            re.DOTALL,
        )
        tag_items = []
        masked_text_parts = []
        cursor = 0
        for match in block_pattern.finditer(text):
            tag_items.append((match.group(1), match.group(2)))
            masked_text_parts.append(text[cursor:match.start()])
            cursor = match.end()
        masked_text_parts.append(text[cursor:])
